verdict.answer_first: B states the command immediately: '`lsof -i :3000` — it lists...'; A first says 'On macOS:' then gives the same command, still direct but slightly less immediate.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits cleanly to the fastest standard path and frames the other as 'A close second'; A adds more notes and alternatives, making it a bit more option-heavy.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because it gives the core command, PID command, and kill command without extra note-dumping; A is also useful but more cluttered.
